title: Multi-quantity discounted lines are overcharged
body: line_total discounts only the first unit instead of every unit. A 3-unit line at $10 with 10% off should cost 27.0 (3 * 10 * 0.9) but the cart charges 29.0. Apply the discount rate to the whole line.

title: slugify emits double hyphens and a trailing hyphen
body: slugify('Hello,  World!') returns 'hello---world-' instead of 'hello-world'. Runs of separators must collapse to a single hyphen and leading/trailing hyphens must be trimmed.

title: Legacy date parser crash (already shipped)
body: Closed issue kept in the tracker to prove the generator skips non-open issues. The loop must not propose a candidate for this.
